item.label: Extend config schema for document structure
item.summary: Extend profiles.schema.json and create document-structure.schema.json for config-driven templates

body:
# Description


# Acceptance Criteria


# Notes
Marked done on 2026-04-17 after review. The config schema extensions landed in `profiles.schema.json` and the planning config now carries `document_templates` and `relationship_config`. The implementation satisfied the phase outcome without introducing a separate `document-structure.schema.json` file.
